title: zabelia parvifolia
intro: Zabelia parvifolia, also known as the Korean boxwood or mountain boxwood, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zabelia parvifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Zabelia parvifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
